name: Cucumber Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the cucumber and onion.
2. Drain well and pat dry with paper towels.
3. Combine sugar, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, and mayonnaise in a bowl.
4. Stir until all ingredients are blended.
5. Add the grated cucumber and onion to the mixture.
6. Stir well to combine everything.
Yield: about 2-2/3 cups
